analysis: alternaria_vs_gbi10 — targeted reverse-inversion scan (capability B, D05/D27/D28)
nt_blast: remote NCBI nt, queried 2026-06-20 (non-deterministic — DB is versioned upstream; -max_target_seqs 1 used, see caveat)
nt_blast_caveat: -remote nt with -max_target_seqs 1 is non-deterministic and does not guarantee the single best hit (known BLAST pitfall); it establishes fungal/phylum membership, not species or residency. Species-level calls can drift run-to-run.

query_genome.note: unpublished isolate; EGAP assembly. Alternaria sp. NS26-3-C2 (Harte's cultured isolate). n_contigs and total_bp cross-checked against REPORT.md §2 and the ALT_-prefixed records in refs/combined_ref.fa and per_plant/*.profile.json (ALT class_bp = 33349952).

params_note: minimap2 run as `-ax asm20 -t 4 --secondary=no` (verified in per_plant/*.mm2.err). The corrected result (REPORT §4/§5, D28) gates at >=95% identity over >=200 bp; the original pre-correction gate (>=500 bp + blind FUNGAL marker panel) is preserved in SUMMARY.precorrection.tsv. Sourmash containment produced no usable output in this run and contributed zero evidence.
